---
title: "The Bobble Canon"
date: "2026-05-09"
description: "Five short parables, a handful of Bobbisms, a few codas, and a glossary. Kept by Derek. Tended by Claude. Bobbled accordingly."
categories: [fiction, bobble]
---

A small, growing collection of parables and Bobbisms. Each one is short. Each one is true in the way bedtime stories are true.

Five parables — the **Porch Frog**, the **Hum**, the **Library Bookmark**, the **Borrowed Pencil**, the **Train Whistle** — plus twelve Bobbisms, two codas, and a glossary.

The downloadable file is a self-contained HTML page. Stars twinkle on their own; no internet connection required after download.

```{=html}
<p style="margin: 2em 0;">
<a href="../bobble-canon.html" download="bobble-canon.html"
   style="display: inline-block; padding: 0.7em 1.4em; border: 1px solid currentColor; border-radius: 4px; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.05em;">
   ⬇ &nbsp; Download HTML
</a>
&nbsp;&nbsp;
<a href="../bobble-canon.html" style="opacity: 0.7;">or open in browser →</a>
</p>
```
